title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.675 - Duration of contract, renewal, terms and limitations
text:
407.675.  Duration of contract, renewal, terms and limitations. — No contract shall be valid for a term longer than twenty-four months from the date upon which the contract is signed.  However, a club may allow a member to convert his contract into a contract for a period longer than twenty-four months after the member has been a member of the club for a period of at least six months.  The duration of the contract shall be clearly and conspicuously disclosed in the contract in boldface type of a minimum size of 14-points.  No contract shall contain an automatic renewal clause; provided, however, that such an agreement may provide for the buyer to exercise a renewal.
(L. 1988 H.B. 988)
